Traditional_Chinese: 見習生前段技能，將力量集中後，瞬間爆發出威力的單手武器技能。
見習生中段技能，快速連續突刺敵人的單手武器技能。
見習生後段技能，使用聚集的力量將敵人擊飛，並讓敵人受到強大傷害的單手武器技能。

English: Strikes the enemy twice in rapid succession.
Traditional_Chinese: 將身體彎曲並集氣後，利用反彈力連續揮出二連擊。
急速旋轉身體並在空中施展迴旋斬來攻擊目標。

English: A spinning finishing move that may stun the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 旋轉施展終結攻擊，有機率使敵人暈眩。

English: Draws out the wielded shield's power to increase defense against physical attacks and significantly increase Ranged Block.
Traditional_Chinese: 引出所持盾牌的力量，提升對物理攻擊的防禦力，並大幅提升遠距離格擋。

English: Increases accuracy and enhances the power of the wielded sword.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用劍時的命中率和攻擊力。

English: Increases accuracy and enhances the power of the wielded axe.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用斧時的命中率和攻擊力。

English: Enhances the power of the wielded sword.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用劍時的攻擊力。

English: Enhances the power of the wielded axe.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用斧時的攻擊力。

English: A single powerful strike that hits all enemies around you.
Traditional_Chinese: 以強力一擊攻擊自身周圍所有敵人。

English: Traps the enemy in a net, immobilizing them.
Traditional_Chinese: 集勇者之氣化為一個堅固的網子套住敵人，使敵人無法移動。

English: Absorbs an incoming attack and strikes an enemy with the absorbed damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 吸收即將受到的攻擊，並以吸收的傷害反擊敵人。

English: Reduces all incoming damage from enemies at the cost of attack power.
Traditional_Chinese: 降低攻擊力來提高防禦力，需要裝備武器。

English: Reflects a portion of the damage received back at the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 將所受到的傷害，還擊回去。

English: Increases striking power but makes you more vulnerable to all incoming attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升攻擊力，但所受傷害提升。

English: Swings the weapon to strike surrounding enemies and push them back. Requires a two-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 用武器進行平掃攻擊，並震退敵人，需要雙手武器。

English: A powerful downward strike that may reduce HP Restoration on the target. Requires a two-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 以強力下劈攻擊敵人，有機率降低目標生命恢復效果。需要雙手武器。

English: A powerful upward strike that stuns the enemy. Requires a two-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 強有力向上的打擊擊暈敵人，需要雙手武器。

English: A powerful downward strike that lowers the defense of the target. Requires a two-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 讓敵人受到重大傷害並降低防禦力，需要雙手武器。

English: Pounds the ground, hitting surrounding enemies with a chance to stun them. Requires a two-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用武器大力的敲擊地面，攻擊周圍所有敵人，有機率將敵人暈眩，需要雙手武器。

English: A powerful dual-weapon strike that knocks down the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 以雙武器強力打擊敵人，並將其擊倒。

English: Strikes the enemy and lowers their block rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 力量足以摧毀敵人盔甲，使敵人的防具受到損壞，並降低格擋。

English: Pounces on the enemy from afar, stunning them. Requires two weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 用光速貫通敵人身體，暈眩目標，需要持有兩把武器。

English: Rapidly strikes surrounding enemies twice with both weapons. Requires two weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 將雙刀展開並對周圍的敵人進行攻擊，需要持有兩把武器。

English: Strikes the enemy multiple times, with each hit having a chance to deal double damage. Requires two weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 對敵人發動多段連擊，每次命中都有機率造成雙倍傷害，需要持有兩把武器。

English: A powerful downward strike that lowers the accuracy of the target. Requires two weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 面向敵人跳起來後，使用武器砍向敵人且降低目標命中，需要持有兩把武器。

English: A powerful slashing attack that hits all surrounding enemies. Requires two weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 劈向周圍的敵人，需要持有兩把武器。

English: Increases Attack Speed and striking power at the cost of reduced skill damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 提高攻擊速度與攻擊力，但降低技能傷害。
將所有精神集中在力量，用力揮出去的拳套技能。
在技能的有效時限內提高對方的生命上限。

English: Automatically recovers your HP when it falls below a certain threshold.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到面臨死亡的攻擊時，立刻恢復所損的生命以避免死亡。
恢復施展者周遭限定範圍內的團員生命。

English: Pounds the ground, damaging enemies around you.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用拳套用力敲打地面，使自己附近的敵人受到傷害。

English: Grants all attacks a chance to stun.
Traditional_Chinese: 藉助精靈的力量，找出敵人的弱點攻擊並以一定的機率擊暈。
藉助精靈的力量，使移動速度變快。
藉助精靈的力量，增加格擋。
藉助精靈的力量，增加命中率。

English: Strikes the enemy three times with concentrated power.
Traditional_Chinese: 集中力量連續三次打擊敵人。

English: Increases the target's Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加目標的攻擊速度和施法速度。

English: Heals nearby party members with powerful restorative energy.
Traditional_Chinese: 生命之水降臨在每個隊伍成員的身上，使你周遭的隊友回復生命。

English: Causes the next hit against the target to deal double damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 對敵人施展一次，即可讓敵人下次受到的損害值變成兩倍。

English: Increases the target's Defense and Magic Resistance.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加目標的防禦力和魔法防禦力。

English: Protects the target from incoming critical hits for a limited time.
Traditional_Chinese: 暫時增加目標的暴擊抗性。

English: Draws upon the inner strength of the user and nearby party members, increasing Attack, Attack Speed and Casting Speed for a limited time.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱戰歌，提升自身周遭的隊友攻擊力、攻擊速度和施法速度。

English: Summons a lingering effect that deals damage over time to enemies within its area.
Traditional_Chinese: 設置一個持續效果，使區域內的敵人持續受到傷害。

English: Strikes the enemy with five powerful blows.
Traditional_Chinese: 拳頭冒出火花，同時往前衝刺進行強力的攻擊。

English: Fires a piercing beam at the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 進行直線性的範圍攻擊。

English: Strikes the enemy with a heavy blow that causes bleeding.
Traditional_Chinese: 重擊敵人，並造成持續流血。

English: Enhances the power of the wielded knuckle.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用拳套時的攻擊力。

English: Increases damage dealt to the target while also increasing their Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 使目標受到的傷害增加，但也會提升目標的攻擊力。

English: Strikes nearby enemies with an outward shockwave.
Traditional_Chinese: 利用氣的波動進行攻擊自己周圍的怪物。

English: A fully concentrated strike. Always consumes 100% MP.
Traditional_Chinese: 全力集中的一擊。每次都會消耗 100% 魔力。

English: Strikes the enemy with a ball of flame that may reduce the target's HP Restoration.
Traditional_Chinese: 用火球攻擊敵人，降低目標治療能力的機率。

English: Engulfs the enemy in a geyser of flame, dealing damage over time.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚熱氣來持續傷害對方。

English: A ranged wind attack that pushes the enemy back.
Traditional_Chinese: 施展遠距離風元素攻擊，將敵人擊退。

English: Teleports you to a target point within range.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用魔法之風瞬間移動到指定的地點 (指標範圍內)。

English: Blasts the enemy with a missile of ice that may reduce the target's speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 藉助水精靈的力量攻擊敵人，有機會減緩目標的移動速度。

English: Damages the enemy with a ball of static that may reduce the target's defense.
Traditional_Chinese: 藉助雷精靈的力量攻擊敵人，有機率減少目標的防禦力。

English: Damages the enemy with a stone spike that may stun.
Traditional_Chinese: 藉助大地精靈的力量攻擊敵人，有機率將敵人擊暈。
集中精神力發動無元素攻擊。

English: Blasts the enemy with a ball of fire, setting them ablaze and making them more susceptible to water attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 以火球轟擊敵人，使其燃燒，並更容易受到水元素攻擊。

English: Slices the enemy with cutting winds, leaving them exposed and more susceptible to fire attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 遠程的風攻擊。降低目標的火抗性。

English: A water attack that shoots multiple water orbs at the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 收集空氣中的水氣做成水球後發射。

English: Soaks the enemy with rushing water, making them more susceptible to electricity attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 以奔湧水流浸濕敵人，使其更容易受到雷元素攻擊。

English: Damages the enemy with an electric ball.
Traditional_Chinese: 將雷電壓縮成球體後發射，並讓敵人受到強烈的傷害。

English: Blasts the enemy with a ball of lightning, electrifying them and making them more susceptible to earth attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 以雷電球轟擊敵人，使其觸電，並更容易受到地元素攻擊。

English: Crushes the enemy with a massive stone, making them more susceptible to wind attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 以巨石壓碎敵人，使其更容易受到風元素攻擊。

English: Binds the enemy with roots, immobilizing them.
Damages the enemy with a mental blast that reduces their Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚出惡魔的幻影，使敵人心發恐慌降低攻擊力。

English: Damages the enemy with a ball of mental energy.
Traditional_Chinese: 將精神力瞬間爆發後，發出強力的攻擊。

English: Conjures a mystic wall at your location. On enemy contact, the wall pushes them back, reduces their movement speed, and deals minor damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 利用強大的念力，製造出一面隱形牆，將反彈觸碰到的敵人並減緩移動速度。

English: Damages the enemy through the power of your mind.
Traditional_Chinese: 用你的精神力量對敵人造成傷害。

English: Reflects damage from the enemy's basic attacks. Less effective in PvP.
Traditional_Chinese: 反射敵人普通攻擊造成的傷害，在 PvP 中效果較低。

English: Unleashes a powerful mental explosion that damages surrounding enemies, with a small chance to stun.
Traditional_Chinese: 自身釋放精神屏障，對周遭的敵人造成傷害。小機率可擊暈目標。

English: Damages the target enemy and enemies surrounding them with a psychic blast.
Traditional_Chinese: 將敵人拉進自己的精神世界，使所有進入結界的敵人受到嚴重的傷害。

English: Launches a fiery projectile that engulfs the enemy in towering flames.
Traditional_Chinese: 發射火焰彈攻擊敵人，讓敵人被高大的火焰包圍。

English: Enhances the power of Fire spells.
Calls down a devastating bolt of lightning upon the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 施展強力的雷震，讓怪物受到強大的傷害。

English: Enhances the power of Electric spells.
Unleashes converging bolts of electricity that surge around surrounding enemies, damaging them and reducing their Magic Resistance.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚出雷電的力量，對周圍的敵人造成傷害並降低他們的魔法防禦力。

English: Hurls a spear of stone that shatters on impact, blasting the enemy with flying stone fragments.
Traditional_Chinese: 將銳利的石槍投向敵人。

English: Enhances the power of Earth spells.
Shatters the ground beneath the target enemy and surrounding enemies, sending chunks of earth flying outward, with a chance to reduce their Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 對周圍的敵人區域造成傷害，有一定機率降低目標的攻擊力。

English: Fires an icy projectile that explodes on impact, bursting outward in freezing shards.
Traditional_Chinese: 將水氣凝聚成冰塊，投向對方進行攻擊。

English: Enhances the power of Water spells.
Summons a poisonous cloud above the target enemy, raining toxins that poison the target enemy and surrounding enemies over time.
Traditional_Chinese: 在目標敵人上方召喚毒雲，降下毒素，使目標與周圍敵人中毒並持續受到傷害。

English: Creates a powerful vacuum that crushes the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 把對方的周圍變成真空狀態後，進行風元素攻擊。

English: Enhances the power of Wind spells.
Summons a field of cutting winds beneath the target enemy, damaging the target enemy and surrounding enemies, with a chance to reduce their movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 有效時間內，將特定地區變成強風區域，使所有該區範圍內的敵人移動速度變慢。

English: Calls down a shower of meteors that strike the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚流星雨來攻擊周圍所有的敵人。

English: Summons a raging lightning storm that strikes the target enemy and surrounding enemies, with a chance to reduce Critical Damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚雷電風暴來攻擊周圍所有的敵人，有機會減少暴擊傷害。

English: Engulfs the target enemy and surrounding enemies in a violent sandstorm, with a chance to reduce their accuracy.
Traditional_Chinese: 將敵人包圍在沙塵暴中，對周圍的敵人造成傷害，有機會降低目標的命中率。

English: Summons a freezing blizzard on the target enemy, striking the target enemy and surrounding enemies, with a chance to stun.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚暴風雪來攻擊周圍所有的敵人，有機會將敵人擊暈。
增加使用溜刃時的攻擊力。
增加使用弓時的攻擊力。

English: Turns you invisible for a short time.
Traditional_Chinese: 施展出幻影，並隱身黑暗處。

English: Fires multiple volleys of arrows wildly at the enemy, some of which may miss.
Traditional_Chinese: 朝敵人胡亂發射多波箭矢，其中部分可能會射失。

English: Increases movement speed for a short time.
A slow, carefully aimed shot with a chance to deal double damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 瞄準目標射擊，有機率造成兩倍傷害。

English: An attack that may reduce the enemy's movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 使對方的移動速度降低。

English: A surprise attack that deals increased damage during Dark Illusion.
Traditional_Chinese: 屏住呼吸對敵人發動奇襲，在幻影術狀態下使用時將提升攻擊力。

English: Rains down arrows on the target enemy and surrounding enemies, dealing damage over time.
Traditional_Chinese: 向天空發射箭矢，使箭矢像雨般降落在敵人的頭上。

English: A Yo-Yo strike with a chance to stun the enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 集中溜刃的氣，發射強大的暴擊，可造成敵人暈眩。

English: Fires multiple arrows at the enemy, with a chance to reduce their accuracy.
Traditional_Chinese: 定點連續發射箭矢，有機率降低敵人命中率。

English: Steals Penya from the target while under Dark Illusion. Must attack from behind.
Traditional_Chinese: 偷竊金幣以及給予傷害，必須在幻影術狀態下在目標的後方才可使用。

English: Assume a counterattack stance that nullifies the next close-range attack against you and stuns the attacker. You cannot perform other actions while in this stance.
Traditional_Chinese: 進入反擊姿態，使下一次近距離攻擊無效並暈眩攻擊者。姿態期間無法進行其他動作。

English: A powerful Yo-Yo strike that may reduce the enemy's Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 以強力溜刃攻擊敵人，有機率降低其攻擊速度與施法速度。

English: Pulls the target toward you using the Yo-Yo.
Traditional_Chinese: 利用溜刃把對方拉到自己的前面。

English: Increases your Critical Chance and Block Penetration.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加使用溜刃時的暴擊率和格擋穿透。

English: Imbues the Yo-Yo so attacks have a chance to inflict poison and increases Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 在溜刃上追加毒性並提升攻擊力，有一定機率使敵人中毒。

English: Imbues the Yo-Yo so attacks have a chance to inflict bleeding and increases Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 在溜刃上追加致命的效果，使敵人受到持續性的傷害。

English: Imbues the Yo-Yo so attacks have a chance to drain HP and increases Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 在溜刃上追加吸血的效果可吸收對方生命，並且提升攻擊力。

English: Strikes the enemy multiple times with the Yo-Yo.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用溜刃多次打擊敵人。

English: Consumes your own Penya to strike the enemy with devastating force.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗金幣，攻擊目標造成傷害。

English: A surprise attack that can only be used under Dark Illusion.
Traditional_Chinese: 在幻影術的狀態之下才可使用，有機率造成暴擊傷害。

English: Increases Critical Chance for a limited time.
Traditional_Chinese: 在限定時間內提升暴擊率。

English: Shoots ice-covered arrows at the target enemy and surrounding enemies, reducing their movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 向目標敵人與周圍敵人射出覆冰箭矢，降低其移動速度。

English: Fires a flame-imbued arrow that leaves a burning field at the impact point, dealing damage over time to enemies within it.
Traditional_Chinese: 用帶有火焰的箭矢射擊，對目標範圍的敵人造成火焰傷害。

English: Fires a powerful arrow that pierces through enemies in a line.
Traditional_Chinese: 貫通目標，並讓縱向的敵人受到傷害。

English: Shoots a poison-tipped arrow at the enemy, inflicting poison damage over time.
Traditional_Chinese: 用帶有致命之毒的箭矢射擊敵人，有機率造成敵人中毒。

English: Attacks the enemy and prevents them from casting spells.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊敵人，並且追加沉默的效果 (消耗魔力的技能將無法使用)。

English: Attunes you to nature, heightening your senses to increase Magic Resistance and Bow Range.
Traditional_Chinese: 藉由自然之力增強您的感官，提升魔法抗性和弓箭射程。

English: Fires a volley of arrows that stuns the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 一次發射三支箭矢，使目標暈眩。

English: Blinded by the flash of light.
You are stunned and cannot move.
Attack just as an enemy attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 等待敵人的攻擊後，使用敵人的縫隙攻擊。

English: Ignites the ground, creating a burning field that deals damage over time to enemies standing on it.
Traditional_Chinese: 在一定範圍內召喚出火燄，使敵人持續受到傷害。

English: You are poisoned, suffering damage over time and reduced HP Restoration.
Traditional_Chinese: 你已中毒，會持續受到傷害，且生命恢復效果降低。

English: You are stunned and cannot move.
You are bleeding, suffering damage over time and reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 你正在流血，會持續受到傷害，且攻擊速度與施法速度降低。
從敵人身上吸取生命值。
在一段時間內對敵人造成傷害。

English: You are chilled, suffering reduced Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 你受到寒氣影響，攻擊速度與施法速度降低。
增加攻擊力與攻擊速度。

English: Reduces incoming damage by wrapping your body in tree bark.
Traditional_Chinese: 樹皮包覆你的身體，降低受到的傷害。

English: Damages the target continuously over time.
Traditional_Chinese: 在一定時間內，受到持續性的傷害。

English: Strikes the target with your shield, with a chance to stun. Requires a shield.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用盾牌攻擊目標，有機率使敵人暈眩。需要盾牌才可使用。

English: A powerful one-handed attack that recovers FP equal to 5% of the damage dealt.
Traditional_Chinese: 強力的單手攻擊，造成敵人傷害的 5% 將轉化成活力。

English: Enhances combat ability at the cost of 1% of your maximum FP per strike. Damage is increased by 10% of your maximum FP. Requires a one-handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 以每次攻擊最大活力的 1% 為代價提高戰鬥能力，傷害會增加你最大活力的 10%，需要單手武器。

English: Calls upon the moon to afflict the target, dealing damage over time and making them more susceptible to all incoming damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚月光讓敵人虛弱，當有此減益技能效果的狀態下，所受的所有傷害都會增加

English: Protects the monster from stun and rooting debuffs.
Traditional_Chinese: 保護怪物免受眩暈和定身減益效果的影響。

English: Empowered by your dragon, gaining increased Attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 龍之恩典增加您的攻擊力。

English: Empowered by your lion, gaining increased max HP.
Traditional_Chinese: 獅之恩典增加您的最大生命。

English: Empowered by your tiger, gaining increased Critical Damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 虎之恩典增加您的暴擊傷害。

English: Empowered by your fox, gaining increased Attack and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 狐之恩典增加您的攻擊力和施法速度。

English: Empowered by your rabbit, gaining increased Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 兔之恩典增加你的移動速度。

English: Empowered by your griffin, taking reduced Incoming Damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 獅鷲之恩典減少您的承受傷害。

English: Empowered by your unicorn, gaining increased Block.
Traditional_Chinese: 獨角獸之恩典增加您的格擋。

English: Empowered by your angel, gaining increased Critical Damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 天使之恩典增加您的暴擊傷害。

English: Empowered by your king crab, gaining increased Block Penetration.
Traditional_Chinese: 帝王蟹之恩典增加您的格擋穿透。

English: Lets out a furious shout that forces the target enemy and surrounding enemies to focus their attacks on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 發出憤怒怒吼，迫使目標敵人與周圍敵人集中攻擊你。

English: Redirects damage taken by the target player to yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 將目標玩家受到的傷害轉移到自己身上。

English: Blink to a target point, damaging nearby enemies with a chance to immobilize them. If an enemy is defeated by this attack, Rending Entry's cooldown is reset.
Traditional_Chinese: 瞬移至滑鼠點選位置，對周圍敵人造成傷害，並有機率使敵人定身。若敵人被此技能擊殺，技能冷卻時間將重置。

English: Grants the target a barrier that causes all incoming hits to be blocked for a short duration.
Traditional_Chinese: 賦予目標屏障，在短時間內格擋所有受到的攻擊。

English: Creates a gravity well at a target point that greatly slows enemies within the area.
Traditional_Chinese: 在滑鼠指向的位置生成一個深淵，大幅減緩區域內敵人的移動速度。

English: Summons a violent storm around you that pushes enemies back on contact, forming a barrier that prevents enemies from approaching.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚龍捲風環繞自身，擊退周圍敵人，並產生防護屏障，使敵人無法靠近。

English: Grants immunity to crowd control and increased incoming healing, but prevents skill usage.
Traditional_Chinese: 傳承修利的意志進入免疫控制狀態，無法施放技能，並提高所受治療效果。

English: Plants a time bomb on the target enemy that explodes after a short delay, damaging the target enemy and surrounding enemies. Recasting the skill on the same target triggers an early detonation with reduced damage and range.
Traditional_Chinese: 在目標敵人身上安裝一枚定時炸彈，短暫延遲後爆炸，對目標與周圍敵人造成傷害。若對同一目標再次施放「來自小丑的炸彈」，將提前引爆炸彈，但傷害與範圍會降低。

English: Fires a long-range projectile that detonates on impact, knocking down the target enemy and surrounding enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 發射遠程箭矢，並在命中目標周圍引發衝擊波，擊倒周圍敵人。

English: A mysterious magic energy is preventing you from moving.
Traditional_Chinese: 魔法能量使你無法移動。
你感受到防禦力的提升。

English: Monsters have increased attack, but take increased damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加怪物的攻擊力，但怪物的承受傷害也增加。

English: Monsters explode on death, but have an increased drop rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 所有怪物死亡時會爆炸，但增加物品掉落率。

English: Monsters reflect damage, but have an increased drop rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 怪物擁有反彈傷害，但增加物品掉落率。

English: Monsters regenerate a percentage of their HP per second, but grant increased EXP.
Traditional_Chinese: 怪物每秒回復部分生命值，但可獲得更多經驗。

English: Monsters have increased movement speed, but take increased damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加怪物的移動速度，但怪物的承受傷害也增加。

English: Monsters have increased Critical Chance, but grant increased EXP.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加怪物的暴擊率，但可獲得更多經驗。

English: Monsters have a chance to strike twice, but have an increased drop rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 怪物有機率連續攻擊兩次，但增加物品掉落率。

English: Monsters gain lifesteal, but take increased damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 怪物擁有吸血能力，但怪物的承受傷害也增加。

English: Monsters have increased Attack Speed, but have an increased drop rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 增加怪物的攻擊速度，但增加物品掉落率。

English: This entity cannot be defeated while its life-linked target remains above a certain HP threshold.
Traditional_Chinese: 此實體在連結目標的生命值高於特定門檻前不會死亡。

English: Rapidly regenerating HP due to rage.
Traditional_Chinese: 憤怒狀態下快速恢復生命。
受到冰霜區域影響，移動速度降低。

English: The dungeon is covered in patches of ice that slow you down. Increased drop rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 副本中覆蓋著冰霜區域，移動速度降低，但增加物品掉落率。

English: A sticky web slows your movement.
Traditional_Chinese: 黏稠的蛛網減緩了你的移動速度。

English: A brutal strike has shattered your defenses. You take more damage than usual.
Traditional_Chinese: 強烈的攻擊粉碎了你的防禦，增加承受傷害。
降低你的生命恢復效果。

English: The enemy anticipates your movements, reducing damage taken from your attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 敵人預測了你的行動，減少來自您的傷害。

English: Your concentration has been shattered, reducing your magic damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 您無法集中精神，減少您的魔法傷害。
此實體的生命與另一個目標相連。

English: A portion of the damage you deal to this monster is reflected back to you.
Traditional_Chinese: 對這隻怪物造成的部分傷害會反彈回你身上。

English: The Siren draws you closer. Her pain is your pain, redirecting a portion of any damage dealt to her to you.
Traditional_Chinese: 賽伊蓮將你吸引靠近。她承受的部分傷害會轉移到你身上。

English: Your perception fractures. You take double damage, but your damage against monsters is doubled.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的感知產生裂痕。你受到的傷害加倍，但你對怪物造成的傷害也加倍。

English: This monster gains increased Attack while fighting alongside allies.
Traditional_Chinese: 此怪物與盟友並肩作戰時，攻擊力會提升。

English: You are caught in a gravitational well, suffering damage over time and greatly reduced movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到重力影響，移動速度大幅下降並持續受到傷害。

English: This monster steals your life force, but takes 5% more damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 此怪物會吸取你的生命力，但怪獸自身受到的傷害增加了 5%。

English: The Demon Lord has cursed you with overwhelming exhaustion, greatly reducing Speed, Attack Speed, and Casting Speed, and lowering all stats.
Traditional_Chinese: 惡魔領主以壓倒性的疲憊詛咒你，大幅降低速度、攻擊速度與施法速度，並降低所有能力值。

English: Blessed by the Golden Aibatt's generosity, this monster grants 10% increased EXP and drop rates when defeated.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到黃金獨眼蝙蝠慷慨的祝福，擊敗此怪物可獲得 10% 額外經驗和物品掉落率。

English: Shade is a powerful god of fear and rage, and they grant this buff to players by imbuing them with a gust of wind that enhances their reflexes and allows them to move faster.
Traditional_Chinese: 由恐懼之神闇影，賦予的風之祝福，提升玩家的敏捷與移動速度。

English: Iblis is a revered god of apathy and neutrality, and they grant this buff to players by infusing them with a burst of life energy that increases their maximum health and allows them to withstand more damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 由敬仰之神伊普里司，賦予的生命祝福，提升最大生命值能承受更多傷害。

English: Bubble is a legendary god of joy and purity, and they grant this buff to players by creating a powerful shield that provides an extra layer of defense against enemy attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 由喜悅之神巴布樂，賦予的強力護盾，提升防禦力以抵擋敵方傷害。

English: Donate G-Tokens to your guild and upgrade this enhancement's level!
Traditional_Chinese: 捐贈 G-Tokens，提升公會強化等級！

English: Crackling energy envelops the target. Increases the Drop Chance and Experience of this monster by 10%.
Traditional_Chinese: 一股噼啪作響的能量包覆著目標，使其物品掉落率與經驗值提升 10%。

English: Sparks of power drain your strength. Run away to prevent it from spreading!
Traditional_Chinese: 能量火花正逐漸吸取你的力量，快逃！否則會傳染給其他人！

English: You are bound by a tether! Create distance to break it!
Traditional_Chinese: 你已被束縛！遠離敵人以解除束縛！

English: A disease spreads through your body. Hopefully, the fever breaks.
Traditional_Chinese: 疾病逐漸擴散全身，並持續惡化中。

English: Enjoy increased Experience and Drops up to Level 119!
Traditional_Chinese: 119 級以下角色可獲得額外經驗與掉寶！

English: Your team's control over artifacts empowers you, increasing your damage against Kalgas!
Traditional_Chinese: 我方隊伍持有的神器數量可額外提升對卡爾加斯的傷害！

English: The enemy team has claimed total dominance! Your team cannot damage Kalgas until an artifact is reclaimed.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的隊伍正被壓制！擊破神器以奪回力量！

English: Donate 2nd Anniversary Tokens to your guild and upgrade this enhancement's level!
Traditional_Chinese: 將二週年代幣捐贈給你的公會，提升此強化效果的等級！

English: Increases FP and MP Restoration by 10% for you and your partner for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您和您的情侶的活力、魔力恢復增加 10%，持續 10 分鐘。

English: Increases movement speed by 5% for you and your partner for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您與情侶的移動速度提高 5%，持續 10 分鐘。

English: Reload the Experience Lock Gauge by 5% of the maximum.
Traditional_Chinese: 將經驗值鎖定量表恢復至最大值的 5%。

English: Increases party experience by 10% for 30 minutes while you and your partner are in the same party.
Traditional_Chinese: 當您與情侶位於同一劇團時，劇團經驗值提高 10%，持續 30 分鐘。

English: Increases drop rate and Penya gained by 5% for you and your partner for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您與情侶的道具掉落率與 Penya 獲得量提高 5%，持續 10 分鐘。

English: Increases all stats by 5 for you and your partner for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您與情侶的全能力值提高 5 點，持續 10 分鐘。

English: Increases flight speed by 3 km/h for you and your partner for 5 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您與情侶的飛行速度提高 3 km/h，持續 5 分鐘。

English: Cheered on by your partner, your EXP rate is increased by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 在情侶的鼓舞下，您的經驗值獲得率提高 5%。

English: Increases Jump Height by 50 for you and your partner for 10 minutes.
Traditional_Chinese: 您與情侶的跳躍高度提高 50，持續 10 分鐘。
瑪德利賈的精英們將為您指引方向！
瑪德利賈最幸運的指引你！

English: Perform a quick step, teleporting behind your target with a swift attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用迅捷步法，瞬間傳送至目標身後並發起疾速攻擊。

English: Teleport instantly to the rear of your target to deal damage. If used while invisible, the next auto attack within three seconds will be a critical hit, and the cooldown will be reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 瞬間傳送至目標身後並造成傷害。若在隱身狀態下使用此技能，隨後三秒內的首次普通攻擊將必定暴擊，且技能冷卻時間縮短。

English: Gather strength to perform a powerful charging attack against a single enemy.
Traditional_Chinese: 集聚力量，對單個敵人發動強力的蓄力攻擊。

English: Become invisible and spawn a clone at your position which runs in a random direction, reflects damage, and explodes upon death.
Traditional_Chinese: 進入隱身狀態，並在原地生成一個分身。該分身將向隨機方向移動，反彈所受傷害，並在消亡時爆炸。

English: Increases auto attack damage, multistrike chance, and Yo-Yo range when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用後提升普通攻擊傷害、多重打擊機率及飛輪的攻擊距離。

English: Your critical chance is lowered, but critical damage is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 暴擊率降低，暴擊傷害提高。

English: Attacking from behind while invisible deals additional damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 隱身狀態下從背後發動攻擊，將造成額外傷害。

English: Movement speed temporarily increases after leaving invisibility.
Traditional_Chinese: 脫離隱身狀態後，移動速度暫時提升。

English: Focus your mind to gain Nen when used. Can gain up to 10 Nen with this skill. The effects of Nen stacks are multiplied by the number of stacks you currently have.
Traditional_Chinese: 凝神聚意，使用時獲得念氣。此技能最多可積累 10 層念氣。念氣疊層效果將根據當前疊層數量倍增。

English: Your next auto attack is guaranteed to be a critical hit.
Traditional_Chinese: 下次自動攻擊必定暴擊。

English: Your critical chance is capped at 10%, while greatly increasing critical damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的暴擊率上限為 10%，但暴擊傷害將大幅提升。

English: Normal attacks have a chance to fire double arrows.
Traditional_Chinese: 普通攻擊有一定機率發射兩支箭。

English: Knocks back the target with an arrow.
Leap backwards after attacking the target.
Unleashes an area attack within the designated range.
Traditional_Chinese: 在指定範圍內釋放範圍攻擊。

English: Your action speed increases when using non-magical skills.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用非魔法技能時，你的施展速度提升。

English: Call upon your inherent eagle to increase bow range.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚內在的雄鷹之力，提升弓箭射程。

English: Provide Elemental status to the skills..
Traditional_Chinese: 為技能賦予元素屬性狀態。

English: You can ignore one instance of disable or weaken debuffs
Traditional_Chinese: 你可以無視一次控制或虛弱類減益效果。

English: Use Chimera's spirit to curse your target, dealing damage and mutating them into an Aibatt. While mutated, they cannot attack. When fully charged, this skill has a 30% higher chance of success.
Traditional_Chinese: 以奇美拉之靈詛咒目標，對其造成傷害並將其變異為獨眼蝙蝠。變異期間目標無法攻擊。該技能在完全蓄力後，成功機率將提升 30%。
完全蓄力持續時間增加
完全蓄力減益效果提升

English: Track the number of Disable type debuffs you apply, multiplying the bonuses given.
Traditional_Chinese: 根據你施加的控制類減益效果數量，以此倍增其效果。

English: Deal damage in a region around your target, with a chance to Jinx enemies hit, removing their ability to critically hit. When fully charged, the skill duration is increased, and hits more frequently.
Traditional_Chinese: 對目標周圍區域造成傷害，並有機率使被命中的敵人陷入詛咒狀態，剝奪其發動暴擊的能力。技能完全蓄力後，持續時間將延長，且攻擊頻率提高。

English: Track the number of Weaken type debuffs you apply, multiplying the bonuses given.
Traditional_Chinese: 根據你施加的虛弱類減益效果數量，以此倍增其效果。

English: Movement speed is temporarily increased after using Blinkpool.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用空間轉換後移動速度短暫提升。

English: Swing your shield to stun enemies with a certain chance.
Traditional_Chinese: 揮舞你的盾牌，有一定機率擊暈敵人。

English: A spinning attack that releases a gust of wind, hitting nearby enemies twice with a chance to stun.
Traditional_Chinese: 發動旋轉攻擊，釋放一股旋風，對附近敵人造成兩次打擊並有機率觸發擊暈效果。

English: Quickly charge at your target to attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 迅速衝向目標並發起攻擊。

English: Split the skies using your two handed weapon, dealing damage to your target. Requires a two handed weapon.
Traditional_Chinese: 以雙手武器斬裂天空，對目標造成傷害。需裝備雙手武器。

English: Reflects damage while draining HP per second and immobilizing yourself. Can be re-cast to cancel.
Traditional_Chinese: 每秒消耗生命值並使自身無法移動，同時反射所受傷害。可再次施放以取消效果。

English: Gain additional HP recovery when restoring it with items or skills.
Traditional_Chinese: 透過物品或技能恢復生命值時，獲得額外生命恢復效果。

English: Gain stacks of Undying, protecting you from going below 1 HP. If a stack is consumed, HP, FP, and MP are all reduced to 1. Once all stacks are consumed, you are no longer protected.
Traditional_Chinese: 累積不死層數，可保護你的生命值不低於 1 點。當層數被消耗時，生命、活力與魔力均將降至 1 點。所有層數耗盡後，此保護效果消失。

English: Improve the effectiveness of healing received when low on health.
Traditional_Chinese: 低生命值時受到的治療效果提升。

English: Increases the amount of natural HP recovery.
Increase your damage when using one-handed weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升使用單手武器時的傷害。

English: Increase your damage when using two-handed weapons.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升使用雙手武器時的傷害。

English: Increases defense when wearing a shield.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升裝備盾牌時的防禦力。

English: Increases defense when HP is low.
Traditional_Chinese: 生命較低時提升物理防禦力。

English: Increases magic defense when HP is low.
Traditional_Chinese: 生命較低時提升魔法防禦力。

English: The Asylum bestows a 5% hp boost, filling you with eerie strength.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你詭異之力，生命值提升 5%。

English: A hp increase of 10% wraps around you like a spectral embrace.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽魂般的庇護環繞著你，生命值提升 10%。

English: The Asylum bestows a 2% def boost, filling you with eerie strength.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你詭異之力，防禦力提升 2%。

English: The Asylum shields you from harm! Your defense rises by 5% under its eerie protection.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所守護你免受傷害！在它詭異的庇護下，防禦力提升 5%。

English: Imbues your attacks with the power of all elements, increasing elemental damage by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賦予你的攻擊全系元素之力，元素傷害提升 5%。

English: The Asylum grants you a 10% boost to all elemental damage types.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你所有元素傷害提升 10%。

English: A blessing from beyond: +5% speed granted under Asylum’s watchful eye.
Traditional_Chinese: 來自異界的祝福：在幽禁所的注視下，速度提升 5%。

English: The Asylum whispers power. 10% more speed surges through you.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所低語著力量，你的速度提升 10%。

English: The Asylum sharpens your resolve as your attack power increases by 5% with otherworldly force.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所磨礪你的意志，在異界之力加持下，攻擊力提升 5%。

English: The Asylum bestows a 10% attack boost, filling you with eerie strength.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你攻擊力提升 10%，讓你充滿詭異的力量。
幽禁所‧首領增傷微弱祝福

English: Empowered by the Asylum’s presence, your strikes deal 5% more damage to bosses.
Traditional_Chinese: 在幽禁所之力的加持下，你對首領造成的傷害提升 5%。

English: An intense force surges through you! Bosses now suffer 10% more damage from your wrath.
Traditional_Chinese: 一股狂暴之力在你體內洶湧！首領受到你的攻擊時，所受傷害增加 10%。

English: The Asylum grants unnatural harmony. Your base stats increase by 10 as if guided by unseen forces.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你非自然的調和之力。你的基礎能力值提升 10 點，彷彿被無形之力所指引。

English: The Asylum bestows a 10% all boost, filling you with eerie strength.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所賜予你全能力 10% 的提升，讓你充滿詭異的力量。

English: The Asylum veils you in shadow. Damage taken from bosses is reduced by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所用陰影將你遮蔽。來自首領的傷害降低 5%。
幽禁所‧首領大減傷祝福

English: A protective force from the Asylum dampens the fury of bosses. You receive 10% less damage from them.
Traditional_Chinese: 來自幽禁所的守護之力壓制了首領的狂怒。你受到來自首領的傷害降低 10%。
幽禁所‧生命值弱化詛咒

English: A curse from the Asylum weakens your vitality. Your max HP is reduced by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 來自幽禁所的詛咒削弱了你的生命力。最大生命值降低 5%。
幽禁所‧生命值強力詛咒

English: The Asylum drains your life force. You suffer a 10% reduction in max HP.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所汲取你的生命力。最大生命值降低 10%。

English: Your defense falters under the weight of the Asylum's curse. It is reduced by 2%.
Traditional_Chinese: 在幽禁所詛咒的重壓下，你的防禦搖搖欲墜。防禦力降低 2%。

English: The Asylum strips away your protection. Your defense drops by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所剝離了你的防護。防禦力降低 5%。

English: Elemental energy slips from your grasp. All elemental damage is reduced by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 元素之力從你手中流逝。你的元素傷害降低 5%。

English: The Asylum disrupts your connection to the elements. Your elemental power drops by 10%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所擾亂了你與元素的聯結。你的元素威力降低 10%。

English: A subtle curse slows your movements. Your speed decreases by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 一道微弱的詛咒減緩了你的動作。速度降低 5%。
幽禁所‧移動速度強力詛咒

English: The Asylum binds your limbs in dread. Speed is reduced by 10%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所用恐懼束縛你的四肢。移動速度降低 10%。
幽禁所‧攻擊力弱化詛咒

English: The curse dulls your strength. Attack power reduced by 5% under the Asylum's shadow.
Traditional_Chinese: 詛咒削弱了你的力量。在幽禁所的陰影下，攻擊力降低 5%。
幽禁所‧攻擊力強力詛咒

English: The Asylum saps your aggression. Attack power falls by 10%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所汲取了你的戰意。攻擊力降低 10%。
幽禁所‧首領傷害弱化詛咒

English: The Asylum twists your strikes. Damage dealt to bosses is reduced by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所扭曲了你的攻擊。對首領造成的傷害降低 5%。
幽禁所‧首領傷害強力詛咒

English: Your blows grow weaker against the mighty. Boss damage drops by 10% under the curse.
Traditional_Chinese: 面對強者時你的攻擊愈發無力。在詛咒影響下，對首領造成的傷害降低 10%。

English: The curse fractures your inner balance. All base stats fall by 5.
Traditional_Chinese: 詛咒撕裂了你內在的平衡。所有基礎能力值降低 5 點。

English: The Asylum crushes your essence. All base stats are reduced by 10.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所碾碎了你的本源。所有基礎能力值降低 10 點。

English: The Asylum exposes your weaknesses. Damage received from bosses is increased by 5%.
Traditional_Chinese: 幽禁所揭露了你的弱點。受到首領造成的傷害提高 5%。

English: Your defenses falter under the Asylum's curse. Bosses deal 10% more damage to you.
Traditional_Chinese: 在幽禁所的詛咒之下，你的防禦開始動搖。首領級敵人對你造成的傷害提高 10%。

English: Deploy a trap that deals damage with a 15% chance to slow down targets.
Traditional_Chinese: 部署一個陷阱，造成傷害並有 15% 的機率使目標緩速。

English: You have stepped on a trap.
Deploy a trap that deals continuous damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 部署一個陷阱，對範圍內的敵人造成持續傷害。

English: Deploy a trap that deals damage in the designated area.
Traditional_Chinese: 在指定區域部署一個陷阱，對範圍內的敵人造成傷害。

English: Deploy a trap that immobilizes the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 部署一個陷阱，使目標陷入定身狀態。

English: Deploy a trap that pushes the target away.
Traditional_Chinese: 部署一個陷阱，將目標擊退。

English: Normal attack critical damage increases against enemies affected by the Pit debuff from being caught in a trap.
Traditional_Chinese: 對陷入陷阱並處於陷坑減益狀態的敵人，普通攻擊的暴擊傷害提升。

English: Increases damage dealt by normal attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升普通攻擊造成的傷害。

English: Increased damage for auto attacks when you more than 5m from your target.
Traditional_Chinese: 當與目標距離超過 5 米時，普通攻擊的傷害提升。

English: Monsters take less damages from you but have higher drop rates.
Traditional_Chinese: 你對怪物造成的傷害降低，但掉落物品的機率提升。

English: Your auto attacks apply stacks, which pop at 4 stacks to deal extra damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的普通攻擊會疊加層數，達到 4 層時自動引爆，造成額外傷害。

English: Leap forward, knocking nearby enemies towards you and reducing their movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 向前躍起，將附近敵人拉向你身前並降低其移動速度。

English: Gaze upon your target, slowing them down and forcing them to move towards you.
Traditional_Chinese: 凝視目標，使其緩速並被迫向你移動。

English: Invoke the spirit of Cimetiere for a short period on the target area, dealing damage to the vicinity with a chance to silence.
Traditional_Chinese: 在目標區域短暫召喚西梅泰爾之靈，對周圍敵人造成傷害並有機率施加沉默效果。

English: Remove a number of Disable and Weaken debuffs from your target up to the number of Malefic Detonation and Damnation Surge stacks available. This skill consumes all stacks of both skills. The damage of this skill scales with Debuff and Weaken effect on you.
Traditional_Chinese: 移除目標身上的若干控制與虛弱減益效果，移除數量取決於 [災厄迸發] 與 [咒術奔湧] 的當前疊層數。此技能將消耗上述兩種技能的所有疊層，其傷害隨你身上的減益與虛弱效果強度提升。

English: Spin your yo-yos in place to continuously attack all nearby enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 原地旋轉飛輪，持續攻擊周圍所有敵人。

English: Throw a vial of toxins at an area, creating a mist of poison which inflicts damage and has a chance to poison targets nearby.
Traditional_Chinese: 向目標區域投擲毒瓶，生成一片毒霧，對範圍內敵人造成傷害並有機率使其中毒。

English: Rush forward, causing slicing and bleeding the first enemy hit.
Traditional_Chinese: 向前突進，對首個命中的敵人造成切割傷害並附加流血效果。

English: Charge your blood and stomp on the ground, hurting and bleeding nearby enemies. Fully charged stomps do extra hits.
Traditional_Chinese: 凝聚血力猛踏地面，對周圍敵人造成傷害並施加流血效果。蓄力至滿後，踏擊將額外造成多次打擊。

English: Knocks back and causes bleeding with an explosion. Charging increases range.
Traditional_Chinese: 發動爆炸攻擊，擊退目標並造成流血效果；蓄力可提升攻擊範圍。

English: Conjure up a whirlwind in front of you.
Traditional_Chinese: 在你前方召喚一道旋風。

English: Perform a lower-body strike on the target. If the target becomes knocked down from the strike, it is able to be re-casted, dealing increased damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 對目標發動下段攻擊。若此次攻擊將目標擊倒，則可立即重新施放該技能，且造成傷害提升。

English: Creates a sword aura that damages nearby enemies and increases defense.
Traditional_Chinese: 生成劍罡，對附近敵人造成傷害並提升防禦。

English: Deal more skill damage at the cost of extra HP cost, and restore HP when defeating bleeding enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 以消耗更多生命值為代價，提升技能傷害；擊敗流血狀態的敵人時可恢復生命值。

English: Sub-weapon attacks deal increased damage with normal attacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 副武器的普通攻擊造成額外傷害。

English: You become more comfortable using both of your hands simultaneously.
Traditional_Chinese: 你能夠更加嫻熟地雙手協同作戰。

English: Damage reduction increases as HP decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 生命值越低，傷害減免越高。

English: Reduces Slayer skill cooldowns and increases critical chance. Scales with number of swords equipped.
Traditional_Chinese: 減少三轉狂戰士技能的冷卻時間，並提升暴擊率，數值根據裝備的劍數量加成。

English: Increases attack power. Scaled with number of axes equipped.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升攻擊力，數值根據裝備的斧頭數量加成。

English: Enhance your defense shortly after being affected by a disable or immobility type debuff.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到控制或定身類減益效果影響後，短時間內提升自身防禦。

English: Perform a blessing to remove "disable" type debuffs on nearby allies.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放祝福，移除附近友方身上的控制類減益效果。

English: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with damage reduction. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌，為周圍友方及自身提供傷害減免。吟唱期間使用其他技能將中斷吟唱。聖歌的效果隨持續吟唱時間逐步增強。

English: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with elemental resistance. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌，為周圍友方及自身提供元素抗性。吟唱期間使用其他技能將中斷吟唱。聖歌的效果隨持續吟唱時間逐步增強。

English: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with increased evasion and blocking power. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌，為周圍友方及自身提升閃避與格擋能力。吟唱期間使用其他技能將中斷吟唱。聖歌的效果隨持續吟唱時間逐步增強。

English: Chant a hymn which heals nearby allies and yourself periodically. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌，週期性地為周圍友方及自身恢復生命。吟唱期間使用其他技能將中斷吟唱。聖歌的治療效果隨持續吟唱時間逐步增強。

English: Chant a hymn which provides nearby allies and yourself with increased Attack Power, Magic Power, and Tenacity. While chanting, using other skills will cancel chanting. The effect of the hymn increases as you keep chanting.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌，為周圍友方及自身提升攻擊力、魔力與不屈。吟唱期間使用其他技能將中斷吟唱。聖歌的效果隨持續吟唱時間逐步增強。

English: Breath the flow of salvation into your target, healing them and flowing to nearby targets if they are allies, or dealing damage otherwise.
Traditional_Chinese: 向目標釋放救贖氣息，對其進行治療；若目標為友方，治療效果將流轉至附近其他友方目標；若目標為敵方，則轉為造成傷害。

English: While a hymn is being chanted, gain extra damage reduction for yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌期間，自身獲得額外傷害減免效果。

English: Hymns that are chanted to completion will have their cooldowns reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 完成吟唱的聖歌，其冷卻時間將縮短。

English: While a hymn is being chanted, walking speed is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 吟唱聖歌期間，移動速度提升。

English: Allow other hymn skills to be chanted at the same time.
Traditional_Chinese: 允許同時吟唱其他聖歌類技能。

English: Unleash all your Nen to enter overflow. While in Nen overflow, certain skills Nen Enhancement variations will be used. Nen cannot be gained while in Nen overflow.
Traditional_Chinese: 釋放全部念氣以進入溢流狀態。念氣溢流期間，將啟用特定技能的念氣強化變體。溢流狀態下無法獲得念氣。

English: Attack your target, gaining Nen stacks. \n\n[Nen Enhancement]: This skill has a chance to knock the enemy down. If used during the duration of Force Grip, you will strike multiple times.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊目標，獲得念氣層數。\n\n[念氣強化]：該技能有機率擊倒敵人；若在強制抓取期間使用，將進行多次打擊。

English: Attack your enemy using a strike. If the target is currently knocked down, you will dash forward to quickly close the gap. \n\n[Nen Enhancement]: Grants you tenacity when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 以重擊攻擊敵人。若目標處於倒地狀態，則會向前突進快速拉近身位。\n\n[念氣強化]：使用時獲得不屈。

English: Attack a single target with a chance to knock them down. \n\n[Nen Enhancement]: Increase your block rate when used.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊單體目標，並有機率將其擊倒。\n\n[念氣強化]：使用時提升自身格擋率。

English: Grab the target, restraining both of you from moving, attacking, or using skills. \n\n[Nen Enhancement]: Allows skill usage while restraining the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 抓住目標，束縛自身與目標，使其無法移動、攻擊或使用技能。\n\n[念氣強化]：束縛目標時可使用技能。

English: Focus your mind to launch a damaging orb towards your target.
Traditional_Chinese: 凝神聚力，向目標發射一枚具有傷害效果的能量球。

English: Channel energy from your surroundings for a long period of time, and target it towards a selected area for great damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 花費長時間去引導周遭能量，對指定區域造成鉅額傷害。

English: Casts an aura that increases allies' Critical Damage and Attack. Can be re-cast to cancel the effect.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一道光環，提升友方的暴擊傷害與攻擊力。可再次施放以取消該效果。

English: Casts an aura that increases nearby allies’ defense and block rate. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time. Can be re-cast to cancel.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放光環，提升附近友軍的防禦力與格擋率。無法與其他光環同時使用。可再次施放取消。

English: Casts an aura that increases allies’ critical resistance. Can be re-cast to cancel.
Traditional_Chinese: 生成一道光環，提升友方暴擊抗性。可再次施放取消。

English: Enter a meditative state that reduces damage taken, shortens natural HP recovery time, and increases healing effects. Can be re-cast to cancel.
Traditional_Chinese: 進入冥想狀態，降低所受傷害、縮短自然生命恢復間隔，並提升治療效果。可再次施放來取消。

English: Nen-consuming skills may consume only half the required stacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗念氣的技能，有機率僅消耗所需層數的一半。

English: Reduces the maximum MP penalty from Nen stacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 減少念氣層數帶來的最大魔力懲罰。

English: When Nen charge reaches 20, your critical hits will be more lucky, always dealing maximum damage at maximum level.
Traditional_Chinese: 當念氣充能達到 20 層時，你的暴擊會變得更穩定，在滿級時必定造成最大傷害。

English: Debuffs applied on you do not last as long.
Traditional_Chinese: 自身受到的減益持續時間降低。

English: Normal attacks leave a mark. Hitting the same enemy 5 times deals bonus damage and grants 1 Nen stack.
Traditional_Chinese: 普通攻擊會在敵人身上留下印記。連續命中同一敵人 5 次時，造成額外傷害並獲得 1 層念氣。

English: Increases your chance to gain an additional Nen stack when using Concentration.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用專注技能時，額外獲得 1 層念氣的機率提高。

English: Perform a multi-hit combo on the target. Each hit has a chance to inflict poison.
Traditional_Chinese: 對目標發動多段連擊，每次命中均有機率施加中毒效果。

English: Inflict poison on yourself to increase your power at the cost of defense.
Traditional_Chinese: 使自身中毒，以犧牲防禦為代價換取能力提升。

English: Reduces damage taken from poisoned enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 降低來自中毒敵人的傷害。

English: Increase your damage against poisoned enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 提升你對中毒敵人的傷害。

English: Becoming invisible has a chance to remove your own poison.
Traditional_Chinese: 進入隱身狀態時，有一定機率移除自身的中毒效果。

English: Incinerate your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, they take extra damage. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
Traditional_Chinese: 焚燒你的目標，造成傷害並使其灼燒。對已灼燒目標使用時，目標會受到額外傷害。被灼燒的敵人還會對附近敵人造成傷害，但不會使其灼燒。

English: You are sleeping, and will be awaken once you take damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 你陷入睡眠狀態，受到傷害時會甦醒。

English: You are paralyzed, physical damage is increased and magical damage is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 你陷入麻痺狀態，物理傷害提高，魔法傷害降低。

English: You are shocked and receive extra electric damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 你被觸電麻痺，並受到額外雷電傷害。

English: Gain shields when you use Gale or Gust.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能疾風領域或風障反擊時，獲得護盾。

English: Skill damage increases proportionally to the shield's defense.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能傷害隨護盾防禦值成比例提升。

English: Has a chance to stun enemies.
After charging, a barrier proportional to max HP is generated.
Traditional_Chinese: 蓄力後，生成基於最大生命值比例的護盾。

English: Multiple enemies surrounding the selected target can also be pulled.
Traditional_Chinese: 可同時拉扯選中目標周圍的多個敵人。

English: Applies a defensive penalty to the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 對目標施加防禦減益效果。

English: You can push enemies further away from the landing point.
Traditional_Chinese: 可以將敵人擊退至離落點更遠的位置。

English: Distance you can push enemies increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 可擊退敵人的距離增加。

English: Can move at a very slow speed when the skill is used.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時可以極慢速度移動。

English: Amount of HP consumed per second is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 每秒消耗的生命值降低。

English: Incoming damage is greatly reduced instead of reflected.
Traditional_Chinese: 不再反彈傷害，取而代之的是大幅減少受到的傷害。

English: Auto Attack damage increases, but yo-yo range decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 普攻傷害提升，但射程縮短。

English: Yo-Yo range increases, but auto attack damage decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 射程提升，但普攻傷害降低。

English: Multistrike chance increases, but Yo-Yo range decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 連擊機率提升，但射程縮短。
增加能力值的代價 / 取捨。

English: Defense debuff effect from skill usage is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能帶來的防禦降低效果被削弱。

English: Defense reduction rate is fixed at 60%, but enhances the skill effect.
Traditional_Chinese: 減防比例固定為 60%，但會強化技能效果。

English: The chance to inflict poison status increases with each hit.
Traditional_Chinese: 每次命中時，施加中毒狀態的機率會隨之提高。

English: Skill cooldown increases, but the effect of poison increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能冷卻時間增加，但中毒效果增強。

English: In addition to poison damage, the cloud may blind targets, reducing their hit rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 除中毒傷害外，雲霧還可能致盲目標，降低其命中率。

English: If used while invisible, subsequent normal attacks will always be critical hits, and the skill's cooldown will be reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 隱身狀態下使用時，後續普通攻擊必定暴擊，且該技能冷卻時間縮短。

English: Chance to stun when used while invisible.
Traditional_Chinese: 隱身狀態下使用時，有機率造成眩暈。

English: Charge time doubles, but attack increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 蓄力時間翻倍，但攻擊力提升。

English: Maximum charge stacks are reduced to 2, but damage decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 最大蓄力層數降至 2 層，但傷害會降低。

English: Hits have a chance to immobilize enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊時有機率使敵人進入束縛狀態。

English: Chance to inflict poison status increases per hit.
Traditional_Chinese: 每次命中時，施加中毒狀態的機率提升。

English: Chain attack duration increases, but the number of attacks rises from 3 to 8. Skill cooldown increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 連擊持續時間延長，攻擊次數從 3 次提升至 8 次，但技能冷卻時間增加。

English: Deals additional damage to targets within 3m.
Traditional_Chinese: 對 3 米內的目標造成額外傷害。

English: Deals additional damage to targets further than 5m.
Traditional_Chinese: 對距離超過 5 米的目標造成額外傷害。

English: Buff applies to party members within range, excluding yourself.
Traditional_Chinese: 增益效果僅作用於範圍內的隊友，不包括你自己。

English: The chance to fire double arrows increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 發射雙重箭矢的機率提升。

English: The distance over which the target is knocked back increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 目標被擊退的距離增加。

English: Pushes back enemies within the area along with the target.
Traditional_Chinese: 將範圍內的敵人連同目標一同擊退。

English: Increases the distance of the backward jump.
The movement speed of all enemies hit by the skill is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 被該技能命中的所有敵人，移動速度降低。

English: Maximum number of traps you can place increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 可放置的陷阱最大數量增加。

English: Chance of getting status effects increases.
Traditional_Chinese: 獲得異常狀態效果的機率提升。

English: Enemy's defense is reduced when caught in the trap.
Traditional_Chinese: 敵人陷入陷阱時，防禦力降低。

English: The activation range of the trap increases.
The activation range of the trap increases.
Physical damage increases per Nen stack.
Traditional_Chinese: 每一層念氣都會使物理傷害提升。

English: Magic damage increases per Nen stack.
Traditional_Chinese: 每一層念氣都會使魔法傷害提升。

English: The effect of Aura skills increases per Nen stack.
Traditional_Chinese: 每一層念氣都會提升光環技能的效果。

English: 10 Nen stacks up even when this skill used.
Traditional_Chinese: 即使使用該技能，念氣層數依然可以疊加至 10 層。

English: Has a chance to grant additional Nen stacks.
Traditional_Chinese: 有機率獲得額外的念氣層數。

English: Gain 1 additional Nen with certain chance when the skill hits.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能命中時，有機率額外獲得 1 層念氣。

English: When cast as an enhanced attack, reduces the target's attack and defense additionally.
Traditional_Chinese: 以強化攻擊施放時，額外降低目標的攻擊力與防禦力。

English: Chance to knock down the target increases.
Nen Enhanced strikes will also reduce movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 念氣強化攻擊同時會降低敵人移動速度。

English: Consumes additional Nen to attempt an extra attack.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗額外念氣，嘗試發動一次額外攻擊。

English: Using the skill may not consume Nen.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時有機率不消耗念氣。

English: Casting time is reduced, but skill damage is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 施法時間縮短，但技能傷害降低。
移動速度的減益效果降低。

English: While grabbing an enemy, the damage you take is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 抓取敵人期間，所受傷害降低。

English: You can grab all enemies within range with a chance.
Traditional_Chinese: 有機率抓取範圍內的所有敵人。

English: Movement speed and critical chance increases further when using the skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時，移動速度和暴擊率進一步提升。

English: Critical damage increases when using skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時，暴擊傷害提升。

English: Knuckle damage increases further when using skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時，拳套傷害進一步提升。

English: Damage reduction rate increases while meditating.
Traditional_Chinese: 冥想時的傷害減免率提升。

English: You can move slowly while using the skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 使用技能時可以緩慢移動。

English: Attack all enemies on the path and give additional bleed damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊路徑上的所有敵人，並造成額外流血傷害。

English: Attack range increases but rush distance decreases.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊範圍提升，但突進距離縮短。

English: Increase damage with additional HP cost.
Traditional_Chinese: 以消耗更多生命值為代價，提升傷害。

English: Knock back the enemy hit by the explosion.
Traditional_Chinese: 將被爆炸命中的敵人擊退。

English: Give additional bleeding damage to all enemies hit by the skill.
Traditional_Chinese: 使被該技能命中的所有敵人受到額外流血傷害。

English: Whirlwind moves forward, lifting enemies into the air.
Traditional_Chinese: 旋風向前突進，將敵人浮空。

English: Successful follow-up hits increased damage is increased further.
Traditional_Chinese: 成功追擊時，造成的額外傷害會進一步提升。

English: Increases the chance to knock down enemies.
Successful follow up hit reduces the target's movement speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 成功追擊命中時，降低目標移動速度。

English: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：大幅降低自身移動速度，同時提升友軍的移動速度、暴擊傷害和攻擊力。無法與其他光環同時使用。

English: Casts an aura that greatly reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ movement speed, critical damage, and attack. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：大幅降低自身移動速度，同時提升友軍的移動速度、暴擊傷害和攻擊力。無法與其他光環同時使用。

English: Casts an aura that reduces movement speed but increases allies’ defense and block rate.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：降低移動速度，但提升友軍的防禦力和格擋率。

English: Casts an aura that reduces the caster's movement speed while increasing allies’ magic attack and critical damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：降低自身移動速度，同時提升友軍的魔法攻擊力和暴擊傷害。

English: Casts an aura that greatly reduces movement speed but increases allies’ damage reduction, critical resistance, and element resistance. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：大幅降低移動速度，但提升友軍的傷害減免、暴擊抗性和元素抗性。無法與其他光環同時使用。

English: Casts an aura that greatly reduces movement speed but increases allies’ damage reduction and critical resistance. Cannot be used with other auras at the same time.
Traditional_Chinese: 施放一種光環：大幅降低移動速度，但提升友軍的傷害減免與暴擊抗性。無法與其他光環同時使用。

English: Consume HP to grant a shield to party members proportional to your HP. If used while a hymn is active, the shield amount is increased by up to 15%.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗自身生命值，為隊友生成與你生命值成正比的護盾。若在聖歌技能生效期間使用，護盾值最多可提升 15%。
同時自身也會獲得護盾。

English: Summon a hammer from the skies, leaving a damaging area behind.
Traditional_Chinese: 從天而降召喚一柄巨錘，落地後留下一片持續傷害區域。

English: Fire a root in front of you, binding the first enemy hit in place. If the enemy bound is affected by Stone Pillar or Swampy Area, they are Petrified, increasing the magic damage they receive and reducing the physical damage they receive, and stunning them.
Traditional_Chinese: 向前方發射根鬚，束縛命中的第一個敵人。若被束縛的敵人處於石柱或沼澤區域影響下，則會被石化：受到的魔法傷害提升、受到的物理傷害降低，並被眩暈。

English: Swift piercing attack on a single target in a straight line. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 Stigma stacks, the attack will piercing all enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 對直線上的單個目標發動迅捷穿刺攻擊，施加一層刃印。若對擁有 5 層刃印的目標使用，該攻擊會貫穿所有敵人。

English: Launch a chain of blades towards your target which binds onto them, spinning and attacking enemies around them, then chaining to another nearby target. Has a chance to apply a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks, will steal HP through hits.
Traditional_Chinese: 向目標發射鎖鏈刀刃，將其束縛，持續旋轉攻擊周圍敵人，隨後鎖鏈會連線至附近另一目標。有機率施加一層刃印。若對擁有 5 層刃印的目標使用，攻擊時會吸取生命值。

English: Slam down on the target with both of your weapons, dealing damage around them. Applies a stack of Stigma. If used on a target with 5 stacks of Stigma, they will be silenced.
Traditional_Chinese: 雙持武器猛擊目標，對其周圍造成傷害，並施加一層刃印。若對擁有 5 層刃印的目標使用，會使其沉默。

English: You are immobilized, physical damage taken is reduced, while magical damage taken is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 你處於定身狀態，受到的物理傷害降低，但魔法傷害增加。

English: Petrifying an enemy using Entangling Roots will grant you with bonuses.
Traditional_Chinese: 用纏縛根鬚將敵人石化，會為你提供增益效果。

English: Your movement speed is also increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 你的移動速度也會提升。

English: Enemies hit by the aura have a chance to bleed.
Traditional_Chinese: 被光環命中的敵人有機率進入流血狀態。

English: Extra damage when used on a burning target is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 對燃燒狀態的目標使用時，額外傷害提升。

English: Ignite your target, dealing damage and burning them. If used on a burning target, the damage is reduced but the target is stunned. Burned enemies also hurt nearby enemies, but do not burn them.
Traditional_Chinese: 點燃目標，造成傷害並使其進入燃燒狀態。若對已燃燒的目標使用，傷害會降低，但會眩暈目標。燃燒的敵人還會對附近敵人造成傷害，但不會使其燃燒。

English: Damage reduction when used on a burning target is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 對處於燃燒狀態的目標使用時，傷害減免效果降低。

English: Lock yourself in ice, becoming invulnerable and deal damage to surrounding enemies. You cannot use items or skills while frozen.
Traditional_Chinese: 將自己封鎖在冰塊中，進入無敵狀態並對周圍敵人造成傷害。冰封期間無法使用物品和技能。

English: Freeze your target in a water bubble, stealing health from them.
Traditional_Chinese: 將目標凍結在水之泡泡中，並對其吸取生命值。

English: Conjure a gale of wind around yourself, increasing your movement speed and hurting nearby enemies. While in gale, hits have a chance to apply Suffocate stacks. If a target reaches 5 Suffocate stacks, they are stunned, slept, or paralyzed, at random.
Traditional_Chinese: 在自身周圍召喚狂風，提升移動速度並對附近敵人造成傷害。處於狂風狀態時，你的攻擊有機率施加窒息層數。當目標疊滿 5 層窒息時，會隨機陷入眩暈、睡眠或麻痺。
窒息層數疊加機率提升。

English: You are suffocating. Once you reach 5 stacks, you will be slept, stunned, or paralyzed at random.
Traditional_Chinese: 你正處於窒息狀態。當堆疊到 5 層時，會隨機進入睡眠、眩暈或麻痺中的一種異常狀態。

English: Call upon a ball of lightning towards your target, which will chain to nearby enemies. Has a chance to Shock enemies hit. If the ball hits a shocked target, it will always do maximum damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 向目標發射一顆閃電球，可在附近敵人之間彈射。有機率對命中的敵人造成觸電。若命中已觸電目標，則必定造成最大傷害。

English: Casts storm clouds over a targeted area, periodically striking nearby enemies with lightning. Lightning strikes always inflict Shock. Strikes against Shocked targets deal maximum damage.
Traditional_Chinese: 在指定區域召喚風暴雲，週期性用閃電攻擊附近敵人。閃電必定施加觸電效果；對已觸電的目標造成最大傷害。

English: Disrupt the ground, summoning a stone pillar which hurts enemies and lowers their movement speed. After the duration of the pillar, it explodes, dealing extra damage to nearby enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 撕裂地面，召喚石柱攻擊敵人並降低其移動速度。石柱持續時間結束後會爆炸，對附近敵人造成額外傷害。

English: Create a swamp at the selected area, slowing movement speed and dealing damage. Enemies in the swamp cannot use movement skills.
Traditional_Chinese: 在指定區域創造一片沼澤，降低敵人移動速度並造成持續傷害。沼澤內的敵人無法使用位移技能。

English: Spawn a gust of wind that pushes back nearby enemies, reflects incoming damage, and ranged block chance.
Traditional_Chinese: 召喚一陣狂風，擊退附近敵人，反射受到的傷害並提升遠距離格擋率。

English: Roots will go through more enemies.
Traditional_Chinese: 根鬚可以穿透更多敵人。

English: Roots will explode once they hit an enemy, dealing damage to them. Explosions have a chance to knock enemies down.
Traditional_Chinese: 根鬚命中敵人後會爆炸並造成傷害，爆炸有機率擊倒敵人。

English: Fire additional roots in a cone in front of you.
Traditional_Chinese: 在你前方錐形範圍內額外生成根鬚。

English: The damage you take from burning enemies is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到燃燒狀態敵人的傷害時，所受傷害降低。

English: The damage you take from enemies affected by water skills is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到被水元素技能影響的敵人攻擊時，所受傷害降低。

English: The damage you take from enemies with Suffocate stacks is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 你受到帶有窒息層數的敵人的傷害降低。

English: The damage you take from Shocked enemies is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 你受到處於觸電狀態敵人的傷害降低。

English: When enemies are petrified by Entangling Roots, your incoming damage is reduced and your melee block rate is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 當敵人被纏繞根鬚石化時，你受到的傷害降低，近距離格擋率提升。

English: Skill duration when fully charged is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 蓄力滿時，技能持續時間延長。

English: Mutation chance when fully charged is 100%.
Traditional_Chinese: 蓄力完成時，變異機率為 100%。

English: Damage against enemies with Disable type debuffs is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 對帶有控制類減益的敵人造成的傷害提升。

English: Damage against enemies with Weaken type debuffs is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 對帶有虛弱類減益的敵人造成的傷害提升。

English: Damage taken from enemies with debuffs is decreased.
Traditional_Chinese: 受到帶有減益效果敵人的傷害時，所受傷害降低。

English: When fully charged, target will be slept.
Traditional_Chinese: 蓄力完成時，會使目標陷入睡眠狀態。

English: A blast of hellfire shoots in front of you, dealing tick damage while burning enemies in the line of fire.
Traditional_Chinese: 一道地獄烈焰在你前方迸發，對直線上的敵人造成持續灼燒傷害。

English: The skill also heals MP and FP on allies.
Traditional_Chinese: 該技能還會為隊友恢復魔力和活力。

English: Grants stun immunity for the duration of the buff.
Traditional_Chinese: 在增益持續期間，獲得眩暈免疫。

English: Grants resistance to damage over time effects during the duration of the buff.
Traditional_Chinese: 在增益持續期間，獲得對持續傷害效果的抗性。

English: Consume more of your health to grant more shields to allies.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗更多生命值，為隊友提供更強護盾。

English: The skill's maximum targets is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能可作用的最大目標數提升。

English: Maximum number of stacks is increased to 8 at maximum level.
Traditional_Chinese: 滿級時，最大層數上限提升至 8 層。

English: The God of Death gazes upon you.
Infuse any elemental skills you use with your weapon's applied element, overriding the skill's element.
Traditional_Chinese: 將你使用的任意元素技能注入你武器當前生效的元素屬性，並覆蓋該技能原本的元素屬性。

English: Skill duration scales with INT instead of STA, with increased duration, reduced penalty, and improved casting efficiency as it levels.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能持續時間不再受體力加成，改為受智力加成，且持續時間增加、懲罰降低，並會隨等級提升改善施法效率。

English: Skill damage scaling is improved, but cooldown is increased.
Traditional_Chinese: 技能傷害成長係數提升，但冷卻時間增加。

English: Base damage is increased, but scaling is reduced.
Traditional_Chinese: 基礎傷害提高，但加成係數降低。

English: Health stolen in enhanced effect is increased by 10%.
Traditional_Chinese: 強化效果中的生命竊取提升 10%。

English: Chance to gain an extra Stigma stack.
Traditional_Chinese: 有機率獲得額外的刃印層數。

English: Remove all your Nen stacks at a cost of power.
Traditional_Chinese: 消耗一定力量，移除所有的念氣疊加。

English: Curse your target with divine power, recording the highest hit taken and replicating up to 75% of it upon expiry. This debuff can be expired early if pressed again.
Traditional_Chinese: 對目標施加神聖之力，記錄其期間承受的最高單次傷害，並在效果結束時複製該傷害的至多 75%。此減益效果可透過再次按鍵主動提前結束。

English: Up to 100% of the recorded hit is replicated.

Traditional_Chinese: 首位玩家等級 190 增益
享受 15% 經驗加成，直到 164 級！

English: Strikes the enemy and drains HP based on the damage dealt.
Traditional_Chinese: 攻擊敵人，並根據造成的傷害吸取生命值。

English: A ranged wind attack that may reduce the enemy's Attack Speed and Casting Speed.
Traditional_Chinese: 遠端風元素攻擊，有機率降低敵人的攻擊速度與施法速度。

English: Curses the enemy, immobilizing them with dark magic.
Traditional_Chinese: 以暗黑魔法詛咒敵人，使其陷入定身狀態。

English: Deals damage over time to enemies within the area.
Traditional_Chinese: 對區域內的敵人造成持續傷害。
